## PimentCSS v1.0.1

### Added

- **`context7.json`** — Context7 indexing configuration (exclusions, agent rules, version tags) so AI assistants can fetch up-to-date PimentCSS documentation.
- **README badges** — npm version, downloads, license, CI, docs, and GitHub release at a glance.

### Documentation

- **RELEASING.md** — Context7 submission and library claim workflow.
- **README** — Context7 link and release line updated for v1.0.1.

### Notes

After upgrading, pin CDN URLs to `@1.0.1` in production. Submit or refresh [Context7](https://context7.com/WebmonsterC/pimentCSS) and complete library claim with `public_key` from the admin panel (see RELEASING.md).
